actions.intent: Start by clipping the lower route pressure so vine remains a readable future tax, not a surprise wall.
Clip the upper authored vine lane before it worsens the later pivot.
Make top-route progress while preserving enough dock room for the urgent lower rescue.
Return to the water-near puppy and move it to one-clear-away.
Cash the urgent lower rescue through the clipped vine lane.
Finish the safer upper puppy after the vine tax and lower rescue are resolved.

notes: Designer-approved route that clips vine early, rescues the urgent lower puppy first, then pivots up.
